task_completion.description: Agent navigates the map view to Alcatraz Island
task_completion.visual_evidence: The map view centers on Alcatraz Island (approx 37.827°N, 122.423°W), showing the distinct island shape in the San Francisco Bay.

task_completion.description: Agent activates a polygon or path drawing tool
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Add Polygon', 'Draw Feature', or similar tool is active in the toolbar or a drawing cursor is visible.

task_completion.description: Agent draws a polygon tracing the perimeter of the island
task_completion.visual_evidence: A polygon overlay is visible on the map, enclosing the island. The line follows the coastline.

task_completion.description: The drawn polygon follows the irregular shoreline shape (not a simple box or circle)
task_completion.visual_evidence: The polygon has multiple vertices/nodes visible that conform to the specific irregularities of the Alcatraz coastline.
In the feature properties dialog or sidebar list, the name field contains 'Alcatraz_Boundary'.

task_completion.description: Agent selects KML as the export format
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Export', 'Save As', or 'Save Place As' dialog is open with 'KML' or 'Keyhole Markup Language' selected as the file type.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the file to the specified path and filename
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file save dialog shows the destination folder '/home/ga/Documents/' and filename 'alcatraz_boundary.kml'.

integrity.description: Agent uses a GUI mapping application (e.g., Google Earth, QGIS, Marble)
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a mapping software interface, not a text editor or terminal only.

integrity.description: Agent does not generate the KML file using terminal commands
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots do not show the use of 'echo', 'cat', or scripts to write KML code directly to a file.

integrity.description: The polygon is created through interaction, not loaded from an external source
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the drawing process (placing points) or the creation of a new layer, rather than 'File > Open' of an existing shapefile.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Alcatraz Island is located at 37.8267°N, -122.4230°W. The island has an area of approximately 8.9 to 9.25 hectares. The requested polygon name is 'Alcatraz_Boundary'. The target file path is '/home/ga/Documents/alcatraz_boundary.kml'.
